questionHtml:
What occurs at gas exchange surfaces in the lungs of mammals?


I.  Gases diffuse across a moist surface.
II.  Concentration gradients are maintained by ventilation.
III.  Water is lost.


A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III

meta.title: What occurs at gas exchange surfaces in the lungs of mammals? I. Gases diffuse across a moist surface.II. Concentration gradients are maintained by ventilation.III. Water is lost.
breadcrumbLabels: B3.1.4. Adaptations of mammalian lungs for gas exchange
